_comment: Seed entries for the homepage 'What's new' feed. Each entry has {title, blurb?, href, date (YYYY-MM-DD), audience: [roles]}. The landing renders the 5 most recent entries that match the viewer's roles. Update freely — no rebuild required after a static file change; just re-deploy.

entries.title: Help center re-architected
entries.blurb: Topic-first navigation with role-based audience sub-folders inside every module.

entries.title: Per-module sub-shape: Create & Manage / Reports / FAQs
entries.blurb: Every module now follows a uniform 10-leaf shape with for-learners and for-managers sub-folders.

entries.title: Personalized landing page
entries.blurb: The homepage now adapts to your role — persona cards, recommended modules, and what's new are filtered to you.
